use_cases: Display progress metrics and completion percentages in dashboards
Visualize scores, ratings, or performance indicators
Show health metrics or vital signs in healthcare applications
Render analytics data with threshold-based color changes
Provide animated gauge visualizations for monitoring dashboards
ai_summary: A circular SVG gauge component for visualizing progress metrics, percentages, and performance indicators. Supports threshold-based color transitions, configurable stroke styling, and optional value display. Designed for dashboard integration across SaaS, fintech, and healthcare applications where metric visualization is needed.
